creator: nakai@TokyoNet.AD.JP
text:
nakai> I have fixed the x11-wm/mlvwm port to follow its latest version.
nakai> Please enjoy...
nakai> 
nakai> Yukihiro Nakai

Sorry, this patch includes the multi-byte.
Use this uuencoded file instead.

Yukihiro Nakai
